pi_items.source: README.md (lines 16-20) specifies Parking Lot Camera Type: `always` (continuous); task.json confirms in metadata; verifier.py line 68 checks for has_always=True
README.md (lines 16-20) specifies 'Frame rate: 25 fps (or above 20 fps)'; task.json metadata claims 25; verifier.py line 70 checks p_fps >= 20
README.md (lines 16-20) specifies 'Quality: High'; task.json metadata claims high; verifier.py line 85 processes streamQuality field
README.md (lines 22-26) specifies Entrance Camera Type: `always` (continuous); task.json confirms in metadata; verifier.py line 92 checks for has_always=True
README.md (lines 22-26) specifies 'Frame rate: 15 fps (or above 10 fps)'; task.json metadata claims 15; verifier.py line 93 checks e_fps >= 10
README.md (lines 22-26) specifies 'Quality: High'; task.json metadata claims high

README.md (lines 28-32) specifies Server Room Type: 'metadataAndLowQuality' or 'metadataOnly' (NOT always); task.json metadata explicitly claims metadataAndLowQuality; verifier.py line 116 checks s_has_motion=True
README.md (lines 28-32) specifies 'Frame rate: 10 fps'; task.json metadata claims 10; export_result.sh line 29 queries fps field from API
README.md (lines 28-32) specifies 'Quality: Low'; task.json metadata claims low; task.json shows recording_type includes 'Low' prefix

README.md (lines 34) specifies layout name 'Security Operations Center'; task.json metadata confirms exact name; task description line 5 references this layout; verifier.py line 141 checks layout_found boolean
README.md (line 46) states 'Pass threshold: 70'; task.json metadata confirms 70; verifier.py line 163 checks score >= 70
README.md (line 70) states 'URL: https://localhost:7001'; task.json description line 5 specifies full URL to web admin; task_utils.sh line 4 defines NX_BASE=https://localhost:7001
README.md (line 72) states 'API base: https://localhost:7001/rest/v1/'; task_utils.sh lines 35-72 use /rest/v1/ endpoints; export_result.sh queries /rest/v1/devices
README.md (line 71) states 'Login: admin / Admin1234!'; task.json description line 5 specifies credentials; task_utils.sh line 6 defines NX_ADMIN_PASS=Admin1234!
task.json line 4 specifies env_id; env.json line 2 confirms environment ID is nx_witness_vms_env@0.1
task.json line 6 specifies difficulty: hard; README.md line 9 confirms Difficulty: hard

privileged_info_summary: This is a synthetic VMS (Video Management System) configuration task for the Nx Witness platform deployed on localhost:7001. The task requires configuring three cameras with tier-specific recording policies: Parking Lot Camera (Tier 1) must use 'always' type recording at 25 fps with high quality; Entrance Camera (Tier 1) must use 'always' type at 15 fps with high quality; Server Room Camera (Tier 2) must use 'metadataAndLowQuality' type at 10 fps with low quality. All configurations must cover all 7 days of the week. Additionally, a layout named 'Security Operations Center' must be created containing all three cameras. The system uses admin/Admin1234! credentials and REST API endpoints at /rest/v1/. The pass threshold is 70 points out of 100, with scoring distributed across camera configuration correctness and layout creation.
